page_content:
MUSC127 Vocal Diction: Italian (1 Credit)

Augmentation of private voice study. Phonetics and diction for singers of Italian vocal literature.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Restriction: Must be in a major within the ARHU-School of Music department.

MUSC128 Sight Reading For Pianists (2 Credits)

A course to give the piano major an opportunity to develop proficiency in sight reading at the keyboard.
